next_action: Apply one bounded assisted prompt-load and timeout repair, rerun the live codex exec benchmark suite explicitly, and compare the before/after delta before expanding the suite or adding dashboard/API commands.
overclaim_boundary: A green live shape report does not prove repair quality or productivity lift. The three-task suite remains below the lift gate, so the repair attempt can only compare live delta before/after.
rationale: Goal 022 measured a bounded repair attempt but worsened the live delta because the first assisted task timed out. Goal 006 requires the next step to repair the assisted prompt-load and timeout path before prompt tuning, suite expansion, dashboard commands, or productivity claims.
